advisoryDisposition.registryAudit: not performed because transmitting Relay's dependency graph to the registry was not separately authorized; this contract makes no aggregate vulnerability-count claim
paths: next > postcss <8.5.10 (GHSA-qx2v-qp2m-jg93) remains upstream-owned; forced npm downgrade is rejected
exceljs > uuid <11.1.1 (GHSA-w5hq-g745-h8pq) is no longer reachable because Relay removed ExcelJS
advisoryDisposition.decision: Reject npm audit force fixes and root-only overrides that disappear for npx customers. Retain authoritative advisory review, maintained spreadsheet dependencies, consumer regressions, and the exact deprecation guard.

disposition: Replacing stale ExcelJS with maintained Node 18+ reader/writer packages removes six production warnings and the reachable UUID advisory without changing Relay's Node 20+ policy. Recharts' react-is peer is direct so a clean production tree cannot lose it. prebuild-install remains until Relay separately adopts Node 22+ and better-sqlite3 13 with native/platform proof. Two drizzle-kit warnings remain development-only. Any added or changed warning or guarded runtime dependency fails this guard.
